content_body: Couldn't be more impressed with the company and your customer service! You all reached out ahead of time and gave us all the information we needed. We loved not having to stop by the office and instead, go directly to the cabin. The cabin was great, and you all provided everything we needed! I also left my wallet and had to go back. When we couldn't get back in, Quentin came in no time flat, on a Sunday no less, and helped us out. Every person we spoke with throughout our stay was a pleasure to work with. Overall I couldn't imagine a better experience. Will definitely book through Cabin Rentals of Georgia again!
title: "Couldn't Imagine a Better Experience"
